projectDetail.title: Appstore ID Portal UI
projectDetail.description: A secure internal portal for managing and distributing Apple ID and app account access through an admin dashboard and a controlled public sharing flow.
projectDetail.longDescription: Appstore ID Portal UI is a full-stack management portal designed to streamline the administration and controlled sharing of Apple ID and app account credentials. The system includes a dedicated admin interface for managing apps, account inventories, share pages, access passes, API-based account sources, and operational audit logs. On the public side, users can access a share link, submit a passcode for verification, receive a short-lived verification token, and reveal account credentials only when access is explicitly consumed. This architecture separates verification from credential reveal, helping improve security, prevent quota abuse, and provide a more auditable access lifecycle. The project was built with a focus on operational control, protected credential delivery, and scalable account-sharing workflows.
userdemo: Public sharing flow via /share/[code] and admin management dashboard via /admin
features: Admin authentication and separated admin/public application flows
App and app account inventory management
Share page creation and management for controlled credential distribution
Pass-based access control with quota, expiration, and revocation support
Multi-account assignment to individual share pages
Public verification flow with pass validation, token validation, and credential reveal
Quota consumption only at the reveal stage to reduce unnecessary usage loss
Rate limiting, short-lived verification tokens, and audit logging for access control events
API source integration and cron-based account synchronization
Deletion logs and traceability for apps, app accounts, share pages, and share passes
projectDetail.category: Admin Dashboard / Internal Tool / Access Management Platform

projectDetail.title: E-commerce Website
projectDetail.description: E-commerce website for shoe retail with modern UI/UX design and shopping cart functionality.
projectDetail.longDescription: A comprehensive e-commerce platform built with modern web technologies. Features include user authentication, product catalog, shopping cart, payment integration, and admin dashboard. The project showcases full-stack development skills with responsive design and optimized performance.
